title: helenium fimbriatum
intro: Helenium fimbriatum, also known as Fimbriated Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium fimbriatum include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory and digestive problems.
